case_title: TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES LIMITED vs. GRECO, DAVID ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: CLERK'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOWNSEND STREET ASSOCIATES LIMITED PARTNERSHIP BY BOSON INC., ITS GENERAL            PARTNER AS TO DEFENDANT GRECO, DAVID ANTHONY WORLD READY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRECO, DAVID ANTHONY WORLD READY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 123 TOWNSEND ST #636, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAIVED.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GRECO, DAVID ANTHONY WORLD READY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
